# Server Mode Tests

# === Test 1: Basic Notification ===
# Verify that notifications are properly included in output
mcp-replay -v -speed=10 test-notifications.mcp
stdout 'notifications/message'
stdout 'Test notification'
stdout 'Debug-level message'

# === Test 2: Auto-Respond Mode ===
# Test auto-respond mode which sends all responses without waiting for requests
mcp-replay -v -speed=10 -json -auto-respond -mock-server test-notifications.mcp
stdout '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"capabilities":{"server":true}}}'
stdout '{"method":"notifications/message","params":{"level":"info","data":"Test notification"},"jsonrpc":"2.0"}'

-- test-notifications.mcp --
mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","id":1} # 1000000000.000
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"capabilities":{"server":true}}} # 1000000000.500
mcp-send {"method":"notifications/message","params":{"level":"info","data":"Test notification"},"jsonrpc":"2.0"} # 1000000001.000

mcp-send {"method":"notifications/progress","params":{"progress":1,"total":5,"progressToken":6},"jsonrpc":"2.0"} # 1000000001.100
mcp-send {"method":"notifications/progress","params":{"progress":2,"total":5,"progressToken":6},"jsonrpc":"2.0"} # 1000000001.200
mcp-send {"method":"notifications/progress","params":{"progress":3,"total":5,"progressToken":6},"jsonrpc":"2.0"} # 1000000001.300
mcp-send {"method":"notifications/progress","params":{"progress":4,"total":5,"progressToken":6},"jsonrpc":"2.0"} # 1000000001.400
mcp-send {"method":"notifications/progress","params":{"progress":5,"total":5,"progressToken":6},"jsonrpc":"2.0"} # 1000000001.500

mcp-send {"method":"notifications/message","params":{"level":"debug","data":"Debug-level message"},"jsonrpc":"2.0"} # 1000000002.500

mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"exit"} # 1000000003.000
